title: Thundering Lite Edition
description: Adds custom enchantments obtainable as treasure loot, along with a couple useful combat-related recipes.
body:
Adds the enchantments and recipes from [Minecraft:Thundering](https://modrinth.com/datapack/minecraftthundering) without the structures. Now obtainable through fishing and treasure chests.

Enchantments List:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

-Poison Cloud - Creates a poison cloud on melee attack, stacking in power with each level. But watch out; you can get poisoned, too!

-Weakening - Similar to Poison Cloud, this attack creates a cloud. Only this one weakens whoever stands in it rather than poisoning them.

-Leeching - Heals you on melee attack landed, stacking with each level.

-Thundering - Summons lightning bolts on melee attack, stacking number of bolts on nearby entities with each level. But be careful not to lightning yourself or your pets/allies!

-Thunder Aura - Brings a storm on the horizon. Perfect for aura farming AND using tridents.

-Mark of the Ninja - put it on any piece of armor and when you get down to 3 hunger, you can enjoy super speed.

</details>

The recipes added are a reimplementation of older combat features such as the Notch apple and swords that can block attacks. The Notch apple is crafted like it used to be and blocking swords are crafted with any sword plus a shield. Note that if you want to make a sword which already has enchantments on it a blocking sword, you'll need to craft a blocking sword of that type and then combine both in an anvil.
